positive: A majestic, whimsical forest creature, inspired by celestial deer or mythical rabbits, standing centered in a field of bioluminescent flora. The creature has intricate, glowing antlers or ears that radiate soft, ethereal light. The style should be highly detailed neo-traditional illustration, reminiscent of deep nature poetry and dreamscapes. Composition must be balanced, with the creature filling the central space, surrounded by lush, oversized fantasy foliage and glowing mushrooms. Strong contrast achieved by placing the luminous, pale-colored creature against deep, jewel-toned blues, emerald greens, and midnight purples. Flat graphic appeal with crisp edges, perfect for a central apparel print. Art Deco flora accents.
negative: low resolution, poor anatomy, ugly, deformed, blurry, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifacts, cropped, excess limbs, grain, noise, harsh shadows
